channel.title: Can we use existing website
channel.description:
We are planning to build a website using this https://skirent.wprentals.org/
we want to know after development can we make an android and ios app using frontity?
if so if its easy to learn as i am self wp developer can we build it our own or if its complex to move existing website then how much a freelancer cost us? so we can think of budget and send the proposal to my senior if they approve

item.title: Can we use existing website
item.dc:creator: spreadpeaceandlove99
item.description:
We are planning to build a website using this https://skirent.wprentals.org/

we want to know after development can we make an android and ios app using frontity?

if so if its easy to learn as i am self wp developer can we build it our own or if its complex to move existing website then how much a freelancer cost us? so we can think of budget and send the proposal to my senior if they approve

Read full topic
